history.qwen_rationale: Adding ChangePropertyValue recipes to set java.version, maven.compiler.source, and maven.compiler.target to 17 in the first step will align the build configuration with the runner's JDK 17, allowing the Lombok bump and subsequent steps to proceed.

history.qwen_observation: The build failed because Maven 3.8+ rejects the relative systemPath in legacy jaxb-runtime POMs, and the compiler target was incorrectly set to 24.
history.qwen_rationale: Upgrading jaxb-runtime to 2.3.9 eliminates the invalid systemPath error, while explicitly setting java.version and compiler properties to 17 fixes the invalid target release, enabling the initial build to pass before Java 21 migrations.

history.qwen_observation: The build failed due to an invalid target release (24) and a Maven model validation error regarding a relative systemPath for com.sun:tools, which blocks OpenRewrite's Maven resolver.
history.qwen_rationale: Explicitly setting java.version and compiler properties to 17 bypasses the invalid target release error. Adding an absolute path for the tools.jar property resolves the Maven model validation error, allowing the migration chain to proceed without aborting during dependency resolution.

history.qwen_observation: Maven aborted during model validation due to an unresolved ${tools.jar} systemPath for com.sun:tools, and compilation failed with invalid target release: 24.
history.qwen_rationale: Removing the obsolete com.sun:tools dependency and upgrading jaxb-runtime to 2.3.9 resolves the POM validation error. Explicitly setting compiler properties to 17 overrides the erroneous 24 target, allowing the build to proceed before the Java 21 upgrade steps.

history.qwen_observation: The build failed with 'invalid target release: 24' and Maven model warnings about com.sun:tools systemPath, indicating the POM still targets Java 24 and contains an invalid local dependency reference.
history.qwen_rationale: Explicitly setting compiler properties to 21 and removing the problematic com.sun:tools dependency will resolve the target release error and Maven validation warnings, enabling a successful compile under JDK 17 before proceeding to code-level migrations.

history.qwen_observation: Maven model validation failed due to an unresolved ${tools.jar} systemPath for com.sun:tools in dependencyManagement, blocking compilation and causing an invalid target release error.
history.qwen_rationale: Upgrading jaxb-runtime to 2.3.9 eliminates the transitive dependency with the broken path, while explicitly removing com.sun:tools and overriding compiler properties to 21 resolves the model validation and target release errors, allowing the build to proceed.
